clinical_notes: Patient presents with chronic jaw pain and limited opening. Rule out TMJ pathology.

study_purpose: Pre-implant assessment of mandibular bone density
clinical_notes: Patient is edentulous in the lower right quadrant and is being considered for implants at sites 29-31.

study_purpose: Evaluate impacted wisdom tooth and proximity to inferior alveolar canal
clinical_notes: Tooth 17 is deeply impacted. Surgeon requests proximity assessment before extraction planning.

study_purpose: Upper airway evaluation for suspected obstructive sleep apnea
clinical_notes: Patient reports loud snoring and daytime fatigue. Assess airway volume and minimum cross-sectional area.
Jaw pain, rule out TMJ pathology.

study_purpose: Evaluate maxillary sinus prior to bilateral sinus lift
clinical_notes: Patient is being evaluated for sinus lift and bone grafting at sites 14-15. History of chronic sinusitis.

study_purpose: Assess root development and eruption pattern of impacted canine
clinical_notes: Tooth 11 is palatally impacted. Orthodontist requests assessment of root resorption on adjacent incisors.

study_purpose: Evaluate suspected osteonecrosis of the jaw
clinical_notes: Patient on long-term bisphosphonate therapy presents with exposed bone in the lower left posterior mandible.

study_purpose: TMJ assessment for bilateral temporomandibular joint pain and clicking
clinical_notes: Patient reports bilateral jaw clicking, limited mouth opening, and morning stiffness consistent with TMJ disorder.

study_purpose: Assess inferior alveolar canal proximity prior to lower third molar extraction
clinical_notes: Impacted lower right third molar with roots overlapping the inferior alveolar canal on panoramic imaging.

study_purpose: Evaluate condylar morphology for suspected TMJ osteoarthritis
clinical_notes: Patient reports progressive right-sided jaw pain and crepitus over six months. Orthodontist requests evaluation of condylar surface and joint space prior to orthognathic planning.

study_purpose: Evaluate inferior alveolar canal proximity prior to lower left third molar extraction
clinical_notes: Impacted lower left third molar with roots overlapping the inferior alveolar canal on panoramic imaging.
